reviewSummary.decisionPolicy: Every indexed component, including one-pixel residual-key candidates, was reviewed at readable zoom. Only visually certain generated-background holes, gaps, edge spill, and residual key-color pixels were selected; no authored keyed-gamut subject material was found.
